sentences.english: The university has announced that student parking permit fees will increase by 20% starting next academic year.
sentences.korean: 대학에서 학생 주차 허가 수수료가 다음 학년도부터 20% 인상된다고 발표했습니다.

sentences.english: The additional revenue will be used to fund improvements to the campus parking infrastructure, including the installation of electric vehicle charging stations and the repair of deteriorating surfaces in Lots B and D.
sentences.korean: 추가 수입은 전기차 충전소 설치와 B, D 구역 노면 보수 등 캠퍼스 주차 인프라 개선에 사용됩니다.

sentences.english: Currently, a standard annual parking permit costs $240.
sentences.korean: 현재 표준 연간 주차 허가증은 240달러입니다.

sentences.english: Students who register before May 15th will receive the permit at the current rate.
sentences.korean: 5월 15일 이전에 등록하는 학생은 현재 가격으로 허가증을 받을 수 있습니다.

sentences.english: Did you see the parking fee increase notice?
sentences.korean: 주차비 인상 공지 봤어?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Ugh, yes. Another price hike.
sentences.korean: 에, 응. 또 가격 인상이야.

sentences.english: I mean, the reasons seem reasonable to me.
sentences.korean: 내 말은, 이유가 나에게는 합리적으로 보여.

sentences.english: The parking lots on the south end are in really bad shape.
sentences.korean: 남쪽 주차장은 정말 상태가 안 좋거든.

sentences.english: Sure, but a 20% increase is a lot.
sentences.korean: 그렇긴 한데, 20% 인상은 많아.

sentences.english: That's almost 50 more dollars a year.
sentences.korean: 일 년에 거의 50달러나 더 내는 거잖아.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: $48, to be exact.
sentences.korean: 정확히 48달러야.

sentences.english: But think about it — that's four dollars a month.
sentences.korean: 하지만 생각해봐 — 한 달에 4달러야.

sentences.english: And you're getting EV chargers, repaved lots, better infrastructure overall.
sentences.korean: 그리고 전기차 충전기, 재포장된 주차장, 전반적으로 더 나은 인프라를 얻잖아.

sentences.english: I drive an older car.
sentences.korean: 나는 오래된 차를 몰아.

sentences.english: EV chargers don't exactly benefit me.
sentences.korean: 전기차 충전기는 나한테 별 도움이 안 돼.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Well, the repaving helps everyone, and honestly, more EV charging stations might mean fewer gas cars competing for spots in the future.
sentences.korean: 음, 재포장은 모두에게 도움이 되고, 솔직히 전기차 충전소가 늘어나면 미래에 자리를 두고 경쟁하는 일반 차가 줄어들 수도 있어.

sentences.english: I hadn't thought about it that way.
sentences.korean: 그렇게는 생각 못 했어.

sentences.english: I'm still a little frustrated, but at least the money is going toward something concrete, not just into a general fund.
sentences.korean: 여전히 좀 답답하긴 한데, 적어도 돈이 일반 기금이 아니라 구체적인 곳에 쓰이니까.

sentences.english: Right. And if you register early, you still get the old rate.
sentences.korean: 맞아. 그리고 일찍 등록하면 여전히 이전 가격이야.

sentences.english: So there's a window to avoid the increase entirely.
sentences.korean: 인상을 완전히 피할 수 있는 기간이 있어.

sentences.english: Oh, that's good. I'll have to remember to do that before May.
sentences.korean: 오, 좋다. 5월 전에 그거 해야 하는 거 기억해야겠다.

sentences.english: The man expresses his opinion about the parking fee increase.
sentences.korean: 남자가 주차비 인상에 대한 의견을 표현합니다.

sentences.english: State his opinion and explain the reasons he gives for holding that opinion.
sentences.korean: 그의 의견과 이유를 설명하세요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
